source: rdeal_export_silver = False
%run "DataHubBatchScripts/DEVELOPMENT_TOOLS/get_feature_flags"

#Imports
import json

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace
from pyspark.sql.types import DecimalType

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "rdeal_export_silver"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#display values
display(df)
display(df2)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch


#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Silver_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Silver_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)
# Table: dealpriceblocks: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="dealpriceblocks"

#Create Silver Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    Id STRING,
    Year STRING,
    BlockTransDate STRING,
    CalYear INT,
    CalQuarter STRING,
    Price FLOAT,
    Volume FLOAT,
    Note STRING,
    DealId STRING,
    ETLRunId STRING,
	CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCOps INT,
	CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
	HashKey STRING,
	HashDiff STRING   
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Get bronze table latest records
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                SELECT Id,Year,BlockTransDate,CalYear,CalQuarter,Price,Volume,Note,DealId,ETLRunId
                FROM rdeal_export_bronze.dealpriceblocks
                WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = 1

# Add CDC columns
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "Id"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "Year", "BlockTransDate", "CalYear", "CalQuarter", "Price", "Volume", "Note", "DealId", "ETLRunId"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (Id,Year,BlockTransDate,CalYear,CalQuarter,Price,Volume,Note,DealId,ETLRunId,
              CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.Id,s.Year,s.BlockTransDate,s.CalYear,s.CalQuarter,s.Price,s.Volume,s.Note,s.DealId,s.ETLRunId,
              s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (Id,Year,BlockTransDate,CalYear,CalQuarter,Price,Volume,Note,DealId,ETLRunId,
              CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.Id,s.Year,s.BlockTransDate,s.CalYear,s.CalQuarter,s.Price,s.Volume,s.Note,s.DealId,s.ETLRunId,
              s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Silver_Update = Silver_Update_Post - Silver_Update_Pre
Silver_Insert = (Silver_Insert_Post - Silver_Insert_Pre) + Silver_Update
Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
Silver_ActiveRows = Silver_ActiveRecord_Post 
Silver_TotalRows = Silver_TotalRowCount_Post

#Create df_log dataframe to insert into controldb logging tables

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_Insert,Silver_Update,Silver_Delete,Silver_ActiveRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
# Table: dealpriceblocks: END
# Table: loadforecasts: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="loadforecasts"

#Create Silver Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    Id STRING,
    DealId STRING,
    Date TIMESTAMP,
    Interval INT,
    LF_P5 FLOAT,
    LF_P50 FLOAT,
    LF_P95 FLOAT,
    ActualMW FLOAT,
	CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCOps INT,
	CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
	HashKey STRING,
	HashDiff STRING   
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Get bronze table latest records
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                SELECT Id,DealId,Date,Interval,LF_P5,LF_P50,LF_P95,ActualMW
                FROM rdeal_export_bronze.loadforecasts
                WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = 1

# Add CDC columns
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "DealId", "Date", "Interval"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "Id", "LF_P5", "LF_P50", "LF_P95", "ActualMW"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (Id,DealId,Date,Interval,LF_P5,LF_P50,LF_P95,ActualMW,CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.Id,s.DealId,s.Date,s.Interval,s.LF_P5,s.LF_P50,s.LF_P95,s.ActualMW,s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (Id,DealId,Date,Interval,LF_P5,LF_P50,LF_P95,ActualMW,CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.Id,s.DealId,s.Date,s.Interval,s.LF_P5,s.LF_P50,s.LF_P95,s.ActualMW,s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Silver_Update = Silver_Update_Post - Silver_Update_Pre
Silver_Insert = (Silver_Insert_Post - Silver_Insert_Pre) + Silver_Update
Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
Silver_ActiveRows = Silver_ActiveRecord_Post 
Silver_TotalRows = Silver_TotalRowCount_Post

#Create df_log dataframe to insert into controldb logging tables

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_Insert,Silver_Update,Silver_Delete,Silver_ActiveRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
# Table: loadforecasts: END
# Table: deals: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="deals"

#Create Silver Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    Id STRING,
    AuthorisedTrader STRING,
    AuthorisedContact STRING,
    Customer STRING,
    PaymentTermsDays INT,
    LatePayChargePC FLOAT,
    EarlyPayDiscountPC FLOAT,
    ContractEndDate STRING,
    ContractStartDate STRING,
    Region STRING,
    AgreementType STRING,
    Book STRING,
    Active INT,
    State STRING,
    DealEntryTrader STRING,
    Status STRING,
    RefId STRING,
    TradeDate STRING,
    CPI FLOAT,
    BrokerFeeValue FLOAT,
    BrokerFeeType STRING,
    VarianceTolerance FLOAT,
    VarianceToleranceMin FLOAT,
    VarianceToleranceMax FLOAT,
    NMI_PCVariance FLOAT,
    NMI_PCVarianceMin FLOAT,
    NMI_PCVarianceMax FLOAT,
    OriginalNMICount INT,
    MinNMICount INT,
    MaxNMICount INT,
    EnvProdPurchasingGeneralNote STRING,
    DealName STRING,
    PricingArrangement STRING,
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCOps INT,
	CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
	HashKey STRING,
	HashDiff STRING   
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Get bronze table latest records
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                SELECT Id,AuthorisedTrader,AuthorisedContact,Customer,PaymentTermsDays,LatePayChargePC,EarlyPayDiscountPC,ContractEndDate,ContractStartDate,Region,
                       AgreementType,Book,Active,State,DealEntryTrader,Status,RefId,TradeDate,CPI,BrokerFeeValue,BrokerFeeType,VarianceTolerance,VarianceToleranceMin,
                       VarianceToleranceMax,NMI_PCVariance,NMI_PCVarianceMin,NMI_PCVarianceMax,OriginalNMICount,MinNMICount,MaxNMICount,EnvProdPurchasingGeneralNote,DealName,PricingArrangement
                FROM rdeal_export_bronze.deals
                WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = 1

# Add CDC columns
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "Id"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "AuthorisedTrader", "AuthorisedContact", "Customer", "PaymentTermsDays", "LatePayChargePC", "EarlyPayDiscountPC", "ContractEndDate", "ContractStartDate",
                           "Region", "AgreementType", "Book", "Active", "State", "DealEntryTrader", "Status", "RefId", "TradeDate", "CPI", "BrokerFeeValue", "BrokerFeeType", "VarianceTolerance", "VarianceToleranceMin",
                           "VarianceToleranceMax", "NMI_PCVariance", "NMI_PCVarianceMin", "NMI_PCVarianceMax", "OriginalNMICount", "MinNMICount", "MaxNMICount", "EnvProdPurchasingGeneralNote", "DealName", "PricingArrangement"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (Id,AuthorisedTrader,AuthorisedContact,Customer,PaymentTermsDays,LatePayChargePC,EarlyPayDiscountPC,ContractEndDate,ContractStartDate,Region,
              AgreementType,Book,Active,State,DealEntryTrader,Status,RefId,TradeDate,CPI,BrokerFeeValue,BrokerFeeType,VarianceTolerance,VarianceToleranceMin,
              VarianceToleranceMax,NMI_PCVariance,NMI_PCVarianceMin,NMI_PCVarianceMax,OriginalNMICount,MinNMICount,MaxNMICount,EnvProdPurchasingGeneralNote,DealName,PricingArrangement,
              CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.Id,s.AuthorisedTrader,s.AuthorisedContact,s.Customer,s.PaymentTermsDays,s.LatePayChargePC,s.EarlyPayDiscountPC,s.ContractEndDate,s.ContractStartDate,s.Region,
              s.AgreementType,s.Book,s.Active,s.State,s.DealEntryTrader,s.Status,s.RefId,s.TradeDate,s.CPI,s.BrokerFeeValue,s.BrokerFeeType,s.VarianceTolerance,s.VarianceToleranceMin,
              s.VarianceToleranceMax,s.NMI_PCVariance,s.NMI_PCVarianceMin,s.NMI_PCVarianceMax,s.OriginalNMICount,s.MinNMICount,s.MaxNMICount,s.EnvProdPurchasingGeneralNote,s.DealName,s.PricingArrangement,
              s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (Id,AuthorisedTrader,AuthorisedContact,Customer,PaymentTermsDays,LatePayChargePC,EarlyPayDiscountPC,ContractEndDate,ContractStartDate,Region,
              AgreementType,Book,Active,State,DealEntryTrader,Status,RefId,TradeDate,CPI,BrokerFeeValue,BrokerFeeType,VarianceTolerance,VarianceToleranceMin,
              VarianceToleranceMax,NMI_PCVariance,NMI_PCVarianceMin,NMI_PCVarianceMax,OriginalNMICount,MinNMICount,MaxNMICount,EnvProdPurchasingGeneralNote,DealName,PricingArrangement,
              CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.Id,s.AuthorisedTrader,s.AuthorisedContact,s.Customer,s.PaymentTermsDays,s.LatePayChargePC,s.EarlyPayDiscountPC,s.ContractEndDate,s.ContractStartDate,s.Region,
              s.AgreementType,s.Book,s.Active,s.State,s.DealEntryTrader,s.Status,s.RefId,s.TradeDate,s.CPI,s.BrokerFeeValue,s.BrokerFeeType,s.VarianceTolerance,s.VarianceToleranceMin,
              s.VarianceToleranceMax,s.NMI_PCVariance,s.NMI_PCVarianceMin,s.NMI_PCVarianceMax,s.OriginalNMICount,s.MinNMICount,s.MaxNMICount,s.EnvProdPurchasingGeneralNote,s.DealName,s.PricingArrangement,
              s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Silver_Update = Silver_Update_Post - Silver_Update_Pre
Silver_Insert = (Silver_Insert_Post - Silver_Insert_Pre) + Silver_Update
Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
Silver_ActiveRows = Silver_ActiveRecord_Post 
Silver_TotalRows = Silver_TotalRowCount_Post

#Create df_log dataframe to insert into controldb logging tables

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_Insert,Silver_Update,Silver_Delete,Silver_ActiveRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

#Set table name
db_tablename="customers"

#Create Silver Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    Id STRING,
    Status STRING,
    Name STRING,
    ABN STRING,
    CreditRating STRING,
    SAPAccountNumber STRING,
    CustomerContacts STRING,
    Deals STRING,
    RefId STRING,
    CustomerGroup STRING,
    CreditRatingDate STRING,
    NextCreditRatingDate STRING,
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCOps INT,
	CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
	HashKey STRING,
	HashDiff STRING   
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Get bronze table latest records
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                SELECT Id,Status,Name,ABN,CreditRating,SAPAccountNumber,CustomerContacts,Deals,RefId,CustomerGroup,CreditRatingDate,NextCreditRatingDate
                FROM rdeal_export_bronze.customers
                WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = 1

# Add CDC columns
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "Id"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "Status", "Name", "ABN", "CreditRating", "SAPAccountNumber", "CustomerContacts", "Deals", "RefId", "CustomerGroup", "CreditRatingDate", "NextCreditRatingDate"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (Id,Status,Name,ABN,CreditRating,SAPAccountNumber,CustomerContacts,Deals,RefId,CustomerGroup,CreditRatingDate,NextCreditRatingDate,
              CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.Id,s.Status,s.Name,s.ABN,s.CreditRating,s.SAPAccountNumber,s.CustomerContacts,s.Deals,s.RefId,s.CustomerGroup,s.CreditRatingDate,s.NextCreditRatingDate,
              s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (Id,Status,Name,ABN,CreditRating,SAPAccountNumber,CustomerContacts,Deals,RefId,CustomerGroup,CreditRatingDate,NextCreditRatingDate,
              CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.Id,s.Status,s.Name,s.ABN,s.CreditRating,s.SAPAccountNumber,s.CustomerContacts,s.Deals,s.RefId,s.CustomerGroup,s.CreditRatingDate,s.NextCreditRatingDate,
              s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)

Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
